title: ItemLocationImpl

addressLine1.description: The first line of the street address.

addressLine2.description: The second line of the street address. This field may contain such values as an apartment or suite number.

city.description:
The city in which the item is located.

Restriction: This field is populated in the search method response only when fieldgroups = EXTENDED.

country.description: The two-letter ISO 3166 standard code that indicates the country in which the item is located. For implementation help, refer to eBay API documentation

county.description: The county in which the item is located.

postalCode.description: The postal code (or zip code in US) where the item is located. Sellers set a postal code for items when they are listed. The postal code is used for calculating proximity searches. It is anonymized when returned in itemLocation.postalCode via the API.

stateOrProvince.description: The state or province in which the item is located.

description: The type that defines the fields for the location of an item, such as information typically used for an address, including postal code, county, state/province, street address, city, and country (2-digit ISO code).
